languages.text: "Ты уже получил свою награду, Тразин — Номоса. К'Тан останется Человечеству, и твои выходки с моим сознанием тебе не помогут".

traits.locale_text: "Ты уже получил свою награду, Тразин — Номоса. К'Тан останется Человечеству, и твои выходки с моим сознанием тебе не помогут".

languages.text: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."
languages.original_text: "Ты уже получил свою награду, Тразин — Номоса. К'Тан останется Человечеству, и твои выходки с моим сознанием тебе не помогут".

traits.locale_text: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."
"You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."
"You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."

languages.text: “特拉金，你已经拿到你的报酬诺莫斯了。不管你要对我的脑子耍什么花招，那星神都将留在人类手中。”
languages.original_text: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."

traits.locale_text: “特拉金，你已经拿到你的报酬诺莫斯了。不管你要对我的脑子耍什么花招，那星神都将留在人类手中。”

languages.text: «Ya tienes tu recompensa, Trazyn, es Nomos. El C'tan seguirá en manos de la Humanidad, por mucho que intentes manipular mi mente».
languages.original_text: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."

traits.locale_text: «Ya tienes tu recompensa, Trazyn, es Nomos. El C'tan seguirá en manos de la Humanidad, por mucho que intentes manipular mi mente».

languages.text: « Vous avez déjà votre récompense, Trazyn : Nomos. Le C'tan demeurera aux mains de l'humanité, peu importent vos petits jeux de manipulation. »
languages.original_text: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez déjà votre récompense, Trazyn : Nomos. Le C'tan demeurera aux mains de l'humanité, peu importent vos petits jeux de manipulation. »

languages.text: "Zaten ödülünü aldın Trazyn. Nomos'u aldın. C'tan, zihnime hangi oyunları oynamaya çalışırsan çalış İnsanlığın mülkiyetinde kalacak."
languages.original_text: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."

traits.locale_text: "Zaten ödülünü aldın Trazyn. Nomos'u aldın. C'tan, zihnime hangi oyunları oynamaya çalışırsan çalış İnsanlığın mülkiyetinde kalacak."

languages.text: "Ihr habt Eure Belohnung bereits, Trazyn — Nomos. Der C'tan bleibt im Besitz der Menschheit, egal, welche Spielchen Ihr mit meinem Verstand treibt."
languages.original_text: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt Eure Belohnung bereits, Trazyn — Nomos. Der C'tan bleibt im Besitz der Menschheit, egal, welche Spielchen Ihr mit meinem Verstand treibt."

languages.text: 「あなたはすでに報酬を得ている、トラズン―ノモス。クタンは人類の手に残り、あなたの策略がどんなに巧妙であっても、私の心は揺るがさない。」
languages.original_text: "You already have your reward, Trazyn — Nomos. The C'tan will remain in Humanity's possession, no matter what tricks you try to play on my mind."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたはすでに報酬を得ている、トラズン―ノモス。クタンは人類の手に残り、あなたの策略がどんなに巧妙であっても、私の心は揺るがさない。」
